ayahEnglish: And Paradise will be brought near to the righteous, not far,

ayahArabic: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هُمْ أَشَدُّ مِنْهُم بَطْشًا فَنَقَّبُوا۟ فِى ٱلْبِلٰدِ هَلْ مِن مَّحِيصٍ
ayahEnglish: And how many a generation before them did We destroy who were greater than them in [striking] power and had explored throughout the lands. Is there any place of escape?

ayahEnglish: Indeed in that is a reminder for whoever has a heart or who listens while he is present [in mind].

targetTranslation: We created (connected to وَلَقَدْ - and indeed)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ وَمَا مَسَّنَا مِن لُّغُوبٍ
ayahEnglish: And We did certainly create the heavens and earth and what is between them in six days, and there touched Us no weariness.

ayahEnglish: And We did certainly create the heavens and earth and what is between them in six days, and there touched Us no weariness.

ayahArabic: فَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ ٱلْغُرُوبِ
ayahEnglish: So be patient, [O Muḥammad], over what they say and exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its setting,

ayahArabic: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيْهِم بِجَبَّارٍ فَذَكِّرْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ
ayahEnglish: We are most knowing of what they say, and you are not over them a tyrant. But remind by the Qur’ān whoever fears My threat.

ayahArabic: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيْهِم بِجَبَّارٍ فَذَكِّرْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ
ayahEnglish: We are most knowing of what they say, and you are not over them a tyrant. But remind by the Qur’ān whoever fears My threat.

ayahArabic: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيْهِم بِجَبَّارٍ فَذَكِّرْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ
ayahEnglish: We are most knowing of what they say, and you are not over them a tyrant. But remind by the Qur’ān whoever fears My threat.
